data.title: Global leaders saw innovation at D2L Fusion 2025 in Georgia. D2L unveiled Createspace, Accessibility+, and updates to Brightspace and Lumi.
data.description: At the 22nd annual Fusion user conference in Savannah, Georgia, D2L, a leading global learning innovation company, unveiled several updates and products. These include the launch of Createspace and Accessibility+, as well as enhancements to D2L Brightspace and D2L Lumi. The event took place on July 24, 2025, with significant attendance from educators and industry professionals. Createspace and Accessibility+ aim to improve user experience, while updates to D2L Brightspace and D2L Lumi offer enhanced functionalities. The conference showcased D2L's commitment to advancing educational technology and supporting learning opportunities worldwide.

data.title: ProCap BTC LLC and CCCM file Form S-4 with SEC for potential merger. Bitcoin focus. Nasdaq: CCCM.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in New York, ProCap BTC LLC, a company specializing in managing bitcoin assets, providing bitcoin education, and engaging in other bitcoin-related services, partnered with Columbus Circle Capital Corp I (Nasdaq: CCCM), a special-purpose acquisition company.

data.title: Liberty Energy Inc. reports Q2 2025 results: $1.0 billion revenue, $71 million net income, $181 million EBITDA, $13 million to shareholders.
data.description: In Denver, Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) shared its second quarter 2025 financial and operational outcomes. The key highlights include revenue reaching $1.0 billion, marking a 7% increase from the previous quarter. The net income for the period stood at $71 million, equivalent to $0.43 fully diluted earnings per share ("EPS"). Furthermore, the adjusted EBITDA reached $181 million, showing an 8% sequential rise. The company accomplished a 7% TTM Adjusted Pre-Tax Return on Capital Employed ("ROCE"). Additionally, Liberty Energy distributed $13 million to its shareholders through cash dividends.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services (KGS) announces 2025 Q2 dividend at $0.45 per share, payable to stockholders on August 14.
data.description: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. (NYSE: KGS) based in The Woodlands, Texas, has declared a cash dividend of $0.45 per share of common stock for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend, known as the Common Stock Dividend, is scheduled to be paid on August 14, 2025, to all stockholders of record as of August 4, 2025. Along with this announcement, the company revealed that Kodiak Gas Services, LLC ("Kodiak Servic...

data.title: Dr. Reza Zadno retires as PROCEPT BioRobotics President/CEO; Larry L. Wood appointed new leader effective September, 2025.
data.description: In San Jose, California on July 24, 2025, PROCEPT BioRobotics disclosed that Larry L. Wood will become the new President and CEO starting on September 2, 2025. This change comes as Dr. Reza Zadno steps down from his roles as President, CEO, and Director, effective September 1, 2025. Known for its focus on urology advancements, the surgical robotics company operates under the Nasdaq symbol PRCT. This transition marks a significant change in leadership for the company, with Dr. Zadno’s departure and Mr. Wood’s upcoming appointment being key highlights.

data.title: Bitcoin's value may reach $150K in 2021, predicts Mike Novogratz. Ethereum gaining favor over BTC among investors.
data.description: Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz revealed that investors had been shorting ETH previously; however, there has been a notable shift in sentiment, with a growing enthusiasm for the digital coin among investors.

data.title: Athabasca Oil (TSX: ATH) reports strong 2025 Q2 results with operational success, share buybacks, and solid financial standing.
data.description: Athabasca Oil Corporation (TSX: ATH) based in Calgary, Alberta, announced positive second quarter results on July 24, 2025. The Company highlighted strong operational performance, stable financial results, and successful execution of return of capital commitments. With low corporate break-evens, distinctive long-life assets, and a strong balance sheet, Athabasca is strategically positioned for progress. These achievements indicate that the Company is on track to meet its goals and continue delivering value to shareholders.

data.title: Friends Experience now open in Las Vegas at MGM Grand. Features iconic set recreations and Vegas-specific additions.
data.description: "The FRIENDS™ Experience: The One in Vegas" has debuted at MGM Grand on the Las Vegas Strip. This immersive attraction features iconic set replicas, beloved scenes from the show, and exclusive Vegas elements. Visitors can enjoy unique photo opportunities and interact with the world of FRIENDS™. The experience opened to the public on July 24, 2025. Explore this exciting attraction through captivating visuals by clicking the link provided for a glimpse inside "The One in Vegas."

data.title: Ontario International Airport breaks records with 659,000+ passengers in June, 11.9% increase in air cargo volume.
data.description: In June of 2025, Ontario International Airport in California experienced a significant increase in air cargo volume, with a growth of 11.9%. Moreover, for the year, there was a 9.6% rise in air cargo volume. During that month, the airport achieved a milestone by accommodating over 659,000 passengers, marking the highest June passenger total in its history. Additionally, the airport set a new record for international passengers in a single month.

data.title: Discovery Institute praises Trump for addressing homelessness. Robert Marbut commends move to reduce homelessness in US.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Seattle, Robert Marbut, previous Executive Director of the U.S. Interagency Council on Homelessness during the Trump and Biden administrations, expressed optimism regarding a significant development aimed at substantially decreasing homelessness nationwide. Marbut's statement marks a crucial milestone in the effort to address this pressing issue, which currently affects approximately [insert number] individuals across the United States.

data.title: Veracyte Inc. to replace Triumph Group Inc. in S&P SmallCap 600, effective July 29. Warburg Pincus and Berkshire Partners to acquire Triumph in deal.
data.description: Veracyte Inc. (NASD: VCYT) is set to take over Triumph Group Inc. (NYSE: TGI) in the S&P SmallCap 600 starting July 29, following an announcement on July 24. As per the details, Warburg Pincus LLC and Berkshire Partners LLC will be acquiring Triumph Group in a deal that is anticipated to finalize before the trading day begins on Tuesday. This shift in the index is critical for investors tracking the performance of small-cap companies. The development signifies a significant change in the composition of the index and could impact the market dynamics for both Veracyte Inc. and Triumph Group Inc.
